changes.before: What came after would show her more than the grain had.
changes.after: Here the grain had stopped being enough.

changes.before: She was not like them. The fear was simpler: she could keep following a line too far.
changes.after: The fear was simpler: she could keep following a line too far.

changes.before: The city fell behind them slowly.
changes.after: They left the city behind slowly.

changes.before: Then the road did what roads did.
changes.after: Then came hooves on packed earth. Leather creak.

changes.before: Jaina stared at her. Understanding caught up a beat later.
changes.after: Jaina stared at her. Then she understood.

changes.before: Silence, with him thinking in it.
Around her, the road kept moving.
There is a hand farther up the chain. It reaches across distance and wakes what the grain has already taught the body to hold.
changes.after: The grain carried it in, but it is not what is setting them off now. The bodies are answering something beyond the stock.

changes.before: For one hideous instant she nearly said yes.
Her mouth thinned. Nothing more. Enough.
The relay rider shifted in the saddle, not fidgeting, simply trying not to fall out of it.
changes.after: The relay rider shifted in the saddle, fighting to stay seated.

changes.before: The dispatch tube, her notebook, and the salt wind ahead all pointed north.
changes.after: North was there in the dispatch tube, her notebook, and the salt wind ahead.
